metadata.position_exact: EFG Graduate Programme 2026 - Business Functions - Geneva
metadata.job_summary: 18-month rotational graduate programme at EFG Bank starting September 2026 with three 6-month rotations across Private Banking, Global Markets & Treasury, and Investment & Client Solutions. Includes 2-week onboarding in Switzerland, mentorship, and development opportunities in a global private banking environment.

research.company_mission: Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future
research.recent_news: EFG presented 2026-2028 strategic plan with CHF 130M investment in technology to augment CROs through AI-driven solutions and digital tools, aiming for 15% annual profit growth

resume.professional_summary: Master in Finance graduate with M&A advisory, financial analysis, and investment management experience. Currently supporting cross-border deal execution at Auraïa Capital, with prior FP&A experience at Europ Assistance and buy-side M&A at RC Group. Combines analytical skills with client relationship management to contribute to EFG Bank's entrepreneurial private banking approach.
auraia_bullets: End-to-end execution in a lean 3-person deal team across sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, and closing for cross-border M&A mandates in healthcare, tech, and life sciences
Built financial models (LBO, DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and prepared client presentations for Board meetings and investor pitches with deal values EUR 5M–50M
Managed client, advisor, and counterparty relationships throughout transaction lifecycle, coordinating with legal, tax, and accounting specialists to structure deals and negotiate terms
resume.rc_bullet: Worked with the CEO of Healthcare and Retail divisions on evaluating acquisition targets in France and Belgium, preparing investment memos with market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 acquisitions (EUR 10M–30M revenues)
resume.europ_bullet: Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and performed variance analysis on monthly P&L, supporting the CFO on FP&A and strategic projects for the Swiss subsidiary with CHF 50M+ revenues
leadership_bullets: Finalist in 2024 McKinsey Business Case, presenting a data-driven predictive model using order book data and statistical arbitrage with potential CHF 200K annual revenue gain
Led post-COVID financial recovery at AIESEC by sourcing corporate leads and negotiating partnerships, closing 3 key deals generating CHF 60K annual revenue and increasing volunteer placements by 40%
Manages diversified investment portfolio using Cash Secured Puts and Covered Calls, executing disciplined options strategies generating CHF 5K+ annual premiums with +8% returns
resume.courses: Corporate Governance & M&A, Investments, Derivatives, Fixed Income & Credit Risk
resume.skills: Financial Modeling | Investment Analysis | Client Management | Options Trading

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Graduate Programme 2026 - Business Functions Position
cover_letter.intro: I am writing to express my strong interest in the EFG Graduate Programme 2026 - Business Functions. EFG's commitment to "empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value" resonates deeply with my experience leading autonomous deal execution in a lean M&A team. Your recent strategic plan emphasizing digital solutions and AI-driven tools to augment Client Relationship Officers aligns with my background in developing AI-powered financial tools and hands-on client management across multiple mandates.
cover_letter.body_1: **Client-Focused Problem Solving** - At Auraïa Capital, I manage relationships with clients, advisors, and counterparties throughout transaction lifecycles, coordinating with legal, tax, and accounting specialists to structure deals and negotiate terms. This client-oriented approach, combined with my experience building financial models and preparing Board presentations, has taught me to design customized solutions that align with client goals - a core principle of EFG's entrepreneurial private banking model.
cover_letter.body_2: **Analytical Rigor & Forward Thinking** - My experience spans financial modeling (LBO, DCF, trading comps), building automated PowerBI dashboards at Europ Assistance, and developing Screeny.ai - an AI tool that reduces buyer search time by 90% for M&A advisors. As a McKinsey Business Case finalist, I presented predictive models for financial forecasting. This blend of analytical skills and innovative thinking positions me to contribute meaningfully to EFG's investment solutions and global markets functions.
cover_letter.body_3: **International Mindset & Adaptability** - Working across cross-border mandates spanning Europe, US, and Asia, I have developed strong adaptability and collaborative skills. At RC Group, I evaluated acquisition targets in France and Belgium, while at AIESEC I negotiated partnerships that generated CHF 60K annual revenue. These experiences, combined with my personal investment portfolio management, reflect the proactive self-starter mentality and entrepreneurial spirit that EFG values in its graduates.
cover_letter.closing: The opportunity to rotate through Private Banking, Global Markets & Treasury, and Investment Solutions aligns perfectly with my career aspirations to develop expertise in client-facing and market-focused roles. I am eager to contribute to EFG's culture of excellence and continuous learning while building lasting relationships within your international network. Thank you for considering my application.

email.subject: Application - Graduate Programme 2026 Business Functions - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the EFG Graduate Programme 2026 - Business Functions in Geneva.

EFG's commitment to "empowering entrepreneurial minds" and your recent CHF 130M investment in AI-driven solutions resonates with my experience developing AI-powered financial tools and managing client relationships autonomously in M&A. I am eager to bring this entrepreneurial mindset to your private banking operations.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
